message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
!option handwritten true

actor User

box "NSheets Client"
    participant HomeView
    participant HomePresenter
end box

box "Server"
    participant NoteServices
    participant ListNoteController
    participant NoteService
    participant NoteRepository
end box

box "Database"
    database Database
end box

User -> HomeView : onReveal() / navigate to page
HomeView -> HomePresenter : getNotes()
HomePresenter -> NoteServices : listNotes()
NoteServices -> ListNoteController : allNotes()
ListNoteController -> NoteService : findAll()
NoteService -> NoteRepository : fetch
NoteRepository -> Database
HomePresenter <-- NoteServices : onSuccess()
HomeView <-- HomePresenter : setContents()

@enduml
```
